description: Immutable ledger, derived balances, integer cents. Financial state is computed, never stored.

rules.description: All monetary values must be integers in cents (minor units). Column and variable names for money should end in _cents.
rules.guidance: Use CentsSchema from lib/validation/schemas.ts for validation. Never use floats for money.

rules.description: Balances are derived from ledger views, never stored directly in a column
rules.guidance: Use event_financial_summary view or getTenantFinancialSummary() from lib/ledger/compute.ts

rules.description: ledger_entries table is append-only — never UPDATE or DELETE rows
rules.note: Immutability is also enforced by database triggers, but code should never attempt it

rules.description: AI cannot create, modify, or delete ledger entries (AI_POLICY.md hard limit #2)
rules.note: Ledger writes must originate from explicit user actions, never from AI code
